title: Ibrahim Labyad
overview: After witnessing the murder of his father as a child, Ibrahim is drawn into the criminal underworld of Egypt.  While making a name for himself with his best friend Ashri, he finds his high school sweetheart Houria and manages to rekindle their love, but paths intertwine with Abdel Malik Zarzor, the city's crime lord, who is connected somehow to Houria.
